oneTime.description: Runs once when activated. Useful for configuration or setup tasks.

init.description: Called once when the script is loaded

run.description:
Called every cycle. If return value is zero, script will continue to run, non-zero, script will be halted.
If return value is a text string with the file path to a new Lua script, then the new script will be loaded and run.

init.description: Called once when the script is loaded

run.signature: fun(event: number, touchState?: TouchState): string | number
run.description:
Called every cycle. If return value is zero, script will continue to run, non-zero, script will be halted.
If return value is a text string with the file path to a new Lua script, then the new script will be loaded and run.

telemetry.description: Displayed on a telemetry screen page. Has full access to the LCD display.

init.description: Called once when the script is loaded

background.description: Called when the script is not visible on screen

run.description: Called every cycle when the telemetry page is active

init.description: Called once when the script is loaded

background.description: Called when the script is not visible on screen

run.description: Called every cycle when the telemetry page is active

generic.name: TWidget
generic.description:
Base widget table returned by create() and passed to update(), background(), and refresh().
Extend this class to add your own widget state fields.

widget.description: Displayed in a widget zone on color LCD radios. Widgets must be created via the EdgeTX widget system.
notices: Widget name must be 10 characters or less
Maximum 5 options allowed from 2.3 to 2.10, maximum 10 options from 2.11
Option names must be 10 characters or less with no spaces

name.description: Widget name shown in the EdgeTX UI. Must be 10 characters or less

options.description: Table of up to 5 widget options. Names must be 10 characters or less with no spaces

create.description: Called when the widget is created. Must return a widget table

update.description: Called when the user changes widget options

background.description: Called when the widget is not in the foreground

refresh.description: Called every cycle to draw the widget. No touch support in 2.3

name.description: Widget name shown in the EdgeTX UI. Must be 10 characters or less

options.description: Table of up to 5 widget options. Names must be 10 characters or less with no spaces

create.description: Called when the widget is created. Must return a widget table

update.description: Called when the user changes widget options

background.description: Called when the widget is not in the foreground

refresh.signature: fun(widget: TWidget, event: number, touchState?: TouchState)
refresh.description: Called every cycle to draw the widget. No touch support in 2.3

function.description: Activated by a switch. Runs in the background alongside the main firmware. Does NOT have access to the LCD display.
notices: Function scripts do NOT have access to the LCD display
File name (without extension) must be 6 characters or less
background function is not available in 2.3

init.description: Called once when the script is loaded

run.description: Called every cycle while the activating switch is on

init.description: Called once when the script is loaded

run.description: Called every cycle while the activating switch is on

background.description: Called every cycle regardless of switch state

mix.description: Custom mix script that reads inputs and produces outputs used in the mixer. Runs alongside built-in mixes.
notices: Do NOT use mix scripts for anything safety-critical — if the script stops executing, your model could crash
Cannot update the LCD screen or handle user input
Custom scripts run at lower priority than built-in mixes. Execution period is approximately 30ms and is not guaranteed
Should not exceed the allowed run-time or instruction count

input.description: Declares the script inputs shown in the EdgeTX mixer UI. Each entry is either SOURCE or VALUE form

output.description: Declares the output channel names. run() must return values matching this table

init.description: Called once when the script is loaded

run.description: Called every mix cycle. Must return values matching the output table declarations

input.description: Declares the script inputs shown in the EdgeTX mixer UI. Each entry is either SOURCE or VALUE form

output.description: Declares the output channel names. fun() must return values matching this table

init.description: Called once when the script is loaded

run.description: Called every mix cycle. Must return values matching the output table declarations
